title: nageia maxima
intro: Nageia maxima, also known as the 'Kadupul', is a rare and unique flowering plant species native to Sri Lanka. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Nageia maxima include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
